title: No Render
description: Render only the things you want
body:
A Minecraft mod for Forge and Fabric to toggle the rendering of various things.

Too many cows? Your game lags? Stop it, use No Render.  
Too many items? Simply don't render them and save your FPS.  
Don't like seeing other players? Don't render them.  

## Installation

**Fabric 1.19.4+** requires [Forge Config API Port](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/forge-config-api-port-fabric/files/) and [Fabric API](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/fabric-api).

## Features

In-game Config Screen

### Entities

- hide all Entities
- hide Items
- hide Itemframes
- hide Villagers
- hide passive Mobs
- hide Player
- hide Entities based on their id, e.g. `minecraft:creeper`

### World

- skip Light Updates
  ![dark path surrounded by sealights](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1dce3005994e162eaa7b8c38559ac6e539eaab8d_0.webp)
- hide Blocks
  ![a minecraft world where steve and mobs but no blocks are rendered](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0b588837f73010d57bc560fa4be1d785248498c6.png)
- hide BlockEntities (specific things like the rotating entity in spawners)
- hide GlobalBlockEntities (beacon beams and structure block lines)
- hide the Sky
- hide TerrainFog (the one in the Nether)
  ![left: nether view limited by fog, right: extended view without fog](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/P1JANjyp/images/d2fa63e38e39801679461b585017b5816a4f86b5.png)
- hide Particles
